name: Corporate Acquisition Facility Data Transition
description: GlobalWater Solutions has recently acquired the Green Valley Water Facility. You must update the facility's Tier II submission to reflect the new corporate ownership. Open the EPA Tier2 Submit 2025 application. First, import the baseline facility data from C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Tasks\green_valley_baseline.t2s. Once imported, update the following Identification details: Change the Facility Name to 'GlobalWater - Green Valley', and update the Parent Company to 'GlobalWater Solutions'. Next, locate the identification numbers and enter the Dun & Bradstreet Number as '123456789' and the TRI Facility ID as '77001GLBLW12345'. Finally, update the Contacts roster: delete the former contact 'Debra Monaco', and add a new contact (First Name: 'Sarah', Last Name: 'Connor', Title: 'Regional EHS Director', Email: 's.connor@globalwater.com', Phone: '555-123-4567') assigned to the roles of 'Emergency Contact' and 'Tier II Information Contact'. After making all changes, save and export the submission file to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Output\corporate_transition.t2s.
